comments.body:
My plan would be to merge this, I tag the commit and push that upstream, then I add the image update in the same branch without rebasing and make the next Pr, merge that and then again for common so the all follow the same linear branch and not get rebased on main where they might pick up other unrelated changes that might have been merged merged in the meantime.
That seems like the safest way to ensure all the three modules actually work together.
